title: Purchase a Product Successfully
body:
User Story

As a customer,
I want to purchase a product from the online store
so that I can complete my shopping successfully.

Acceptance Criteria
AC1 – Successful Login

Given the user is on the login page

When the user enters valid credentials

And clicks the Login button

Then the Products page should be displayed

And the page title should contain "Products"

AC2 – View Available Products

Given the user is logged in

When the Products page loads

Then the list of available products should be displayed

And each product should display:

Product name
Product description
Product price
Add to Cart button
AC3 – Add Product to Cart

Given the user is viewing products

When the user clicks "Add to Cart" for a product

Then the cart badge should increase by 1

And the selected product should be added to the cart

AC4 – View Cart

Given the user has at least one product in the cart

When the user opens the shopping cart

Then the cart page should display

And all selected products should be visible

And product quantity should be displayed

AC5 – Proceed to Checkout

Given the cart contains products

When the user clicks Checkout

Then the checkout information page should be displayed

And First Name field should be visible

And Last Name field should be visible

And Postal Code field should be visible

AC6 – Enter Checkout Information

Given the checkout information page is displayed

When the user enters valid:

First Name
Last Name
Postal Code

And clicks Continue

Then the checkout overview page should be displayed

AC7 – Complete Purchase

Given the checkout overview page is displayed

When the user clicks Finish

Then the order confirmation page should be displayed

And the user should see:

Thank you for your order!
AC8 – Logout

Given the user is logged in

When the user selects Logout

Then the login page should be displayed

And the user session should end

Negative Acceptance Criteria
AC9 – Invalid Login

Given the user is on the login page

When the user enters invalid credentials

And clicks Login

Then an error message should be displayed

And the user should remain on the login page

AC10 – Checkout Information Validation

Given the checkout information page is displayed

When any mandatory field is left empty

And Continue is clicked

Then a validation message should be displayed

And checkout should not proceed
